Class CodiceFiscaleData

Namespace
CodiceFiscale.Entities

CodiceFiscale.dll

Represents the data required to generate or parse an Italian Codice Fiscale.

public record CodiceFiscaleData : IEquatable<CodiceFiscaleData>

Represents the data required to generate or parse an Italian Codice Fiscale.

public CodiceFiscaleData(Gender Gender, DateOnly DateOfBirth, string BelfioreCode)

Parameters

Gender Gender

The gender of the individual ("Male" for male, "Female" for female).

DateOfBirth DateOnly

The date of birth of the individual.

BelfioreCode string

The Belfiore code representing the place of birth.
